General.Name: Palinda Group Holdings Ltd
General.Description: Palinda Group Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the sale and distribution of wine products and ancillary wine-related products in Hong Kong, the British Virgin Islands, and Australia. The company operates the through Wine Business and Food Products Operations segments. It produces and supplies barbequed food and Taiwanese Lou Mei to concessionaire stores in supermarkets; sells and distributes drinking water products; and invests in securities, as well as engages in the money lending business. The company was formerly known as Food Idea Holdings Limited and changed its name to Palinda Group Holdings Limited in October 2020. Palinda Group Holdings Limited was founded in 2006 and is headquartered in Hung Hom, Hong Kong.
General.Address: Harbour Centre, Tower 1, Hung Hom, Hong Kong
